zh.Whorlton, Yorkshire: 英國英格蘭越可爾爾頓

zh.Cleveland, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell是Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton的兒子，於1304年之後出生在英國英格蘭越可爾爾頓。他於1322年8月與Alice Ros在英國英格蘭越可爾爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1341年11月20日在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭，埋葬在英國越可爾爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell是Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton的儿子，于1304年之后出生在英国英格兰越可爾爾頓。他于1322年8月与Alice Ros在英国英格兰越可爾爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1341年11月20日在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭，埋葬在英国越可爾爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from one of the French places named Mesnil, from Old French mesnil (Latin * mansionile, a diminutive of mansio ‘abode, habitation’), used of the country domain where a noble lived with his family and retainers. As a surname it may also be used of a member of the household, retainer. Some of the bearers listed below may belong to (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Continental Germanic female personal name Maginhild.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell was born after 1304, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton. He married Alice Ros in August 1322, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 20 November 1341, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell est né après 1304, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton. Il a épousé Alice Ros en août 1322, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1341, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell wurde nach 1304 in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton geboren. Er hat im August 1322 in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. November 1341 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell è nato il dopo il 1304 nel Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton. Lui sposato Alice Ros nel agosto 1322, nel Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 novembre 1341, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Whorlton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Whorlton, Hambleton District, North York: イギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynellは1304年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンでNicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorltonの息子として生まれた。1322年8月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンでAlice Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1341年11月20日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell(은)는 1304년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 화를턴에서 Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1322년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 화를턴에서 Alice Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년 11월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 화를턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell nasceu após 1304, em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton. Ele casou-se com Alice Ros em agosto de 1322, em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1341, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell родился после 1304 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Ros август 1322 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 ноября 1341 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell nació después de 1304, en Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton. Se casó con Alice Ros en agosto de 1322, en Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1341, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
